name: Bhatkal Restaurant
description: An Indian restaurant

name: Al Bait ALqadeem Restaurant and Cafe
description: A traditional restaurant

name: Al-Karmel Somali Restaurant
description: East African cuisine

name: Africana Home Restaurant Nakheel Deira Park
address: 1820, Lootah Building Behind Golden Square Hotel Street 118

name: Al Dawaar Revolving Restaurant
description: Serving an assortment of cuisines, the highlight of this beautiful restaurant is that it revolves, giving a nice tour of the city.
price_range: Lunch: 185 dirhams per person, dinner: 235 dirhams per person

name: Al Fanar Restaurant & Cafe
description: Authentic Emirati cuisine, in the ambience of Dubai recreated from the 1960s.
address: Canal Walk, Dubai Festival City Mall

name: Kiku
description: Japanese cuisine. Very high quality and very popular.

name: Legends Steakhouse
description: Part of the Creek Golf Clubhouse. The waterfront restaurant right on Dubai Creek is very popular with residents.

name: Al Bait Alqadeem Restaurant & Cafe
description: Emirati cuisine in a Emirati traditional house.
address: Al Ahmadiya St crossing 15a St, Al Ras

name: Floating Restaurants
description: Tens of dhows propose a diner during a 2-hour cruise on the creek.
address: Baniyas Rd, Al Sabkha & Al Rigga & Rigga Al Buteen communities

name: JW's Steakhouse
description: This is the Marriott's signature restaurant. Very popular with Dubai residents.

name: Filli Cafeteria
description: Probably the most popular tea spots in town, especially Filli, who serves over 4,000 cups a day. Try thezaffrani chai(milk tea with saffron) or thedoodh kadak(strong milk tea).

name: The Edge Pool & Bar
description: Small bar but wonderful views especially at sunset.

name: X Club
description: Russia-themed bar.

name: Gharana
description: Gharana an Indian Restaurant in Holiday Inn Dubai – Al Barsha hotel brings you flavors of various spices and herbs with live entertainment.

name: Basta Art Cafe
description: Set in a lovely garden courtyard in a restored house. Great place to take a breather with a cold drink and write some postcards. The sandwiches-and-salads menu is aimed squarely at tourists, but if you are sick of kebabs, they will cater to your salmon-avocado wrap and mango smoothie cravings. The "Basta Special" drink of mint and lemon is also excellent.

name: Gazebo
description: Very nice and warm welcome given by the waiters. Food as good too. Not so expensive when compared to the quality of food.

name: Ravi Restaurant
description: A Pakistani restaurant that provides cheap Pakistani & Indian food. Good for anyone with a spicy tooth.

name: [formerly dead link]Student Biryani
description: A Pakistani restaurant serving the country's most popular biryani.

name: Local House
description: Emirati cuisine featuring camel meats and camel milkshakes in a traditional Dubai house.
address: House 51, Al Fahidi Historical Neighbourhood, 19 Al Fahidi St, Al Souk Al Kabeer community

name: Al Haj Bundu Khan
description: Indian and Pakistani food.

name: Pars Iranian Kitchen
description: This is an open air Iranian restaurant where one can sit in traditional machans (large bed-like seating) and enjoy a fine Iranian meal. The speciality is the mixed grill which is served with live coal. After the meal, you may smoke a traditional sheesha pipe. No alcohol served.

name: Wafi Gourmet
description: Excellent Lebanese cuisine and ambience. In the cooler months the outdoor verandah is a pleasure. No alcohol served.

name: Yakitori House
description: Japanese cuisine, very popular with the Japanese expat community.
address: Century Hotel, Khalid Bin Walid St, Bur Dubai

name: Asha's
description: Indian cuisine. Run by Asha Bosle. Good food but a little expensive

name: Manhattan Grill
description: Fine dining restaurant with New York-inspired cuisine, specialising in steak. A suitable venue for romantic dinners and family gatherings.

name: Barrels Pub
description: It is a bar is a clean, quiet and bright venue with large variates of snacks options. Every wall is mounted with screen playing number of sports games. The interiors looks good with polished timber tables and benches all around and wall cladding.

name: Bollywood Café
description: Excellent DJ, Live music and Indian food. It is aBollywood-themed glamorous bar and nightlife with elegant to casual laid backs and pleasant musical twists, mostly Indian music.

name: Chill Rooftop Lounge
description: Dance floor with excellent DJ. It is an expansive rooftop venue painted in pink surrounded with fake grass. An outdoor seating place with good food.

name: Marine's Club
description: A lively bar and nightclub with 80s music most of the time. It is a budget friendly venue with great service and superb bouncers.

name: 800 Pizza
description: Traditional & authentic Italian pizza baked in wood fired Italian stone oven, thin & crispy crust.

name: More Cafe
description: Serves breakfast, lunch and light continental and oriental meals. Good service and big portions.

name: Noodle House
description: Asian food.
address: Emirates Towers Shopping Blvd, Madinat Jumeirah

name: Chill Out
description: Have a delicious contemporary European food in ice lounge at a chilling temperature of −6°C (21°F). It is first of its kind in the Middle East. From tables to even crockery in which food is served, all made of ice.
address: Times Square Centre, Ground F, Sheihk Zayed Rd, Al Marabea St, Al Quoz community

name: Chimes
description: Thai, Singaporean, Malaysian and Indonesian themed food, and the popular house speciality must be the pepper or chili crab. You can eat at the restaurant or order home delivery to most areas of new Dubai.

name: Jedoudna Restaurant
description: A family-run Lebanese restaurant. With outdoor seating and separate shisha area.
address: Rimal Sector, The Walk at Jumeirah Beach Residence

name: Karam Beirut
description: Excellent Lebanese food.
address: 1st floor, Mall of Emirates, Sheykh Zayed Rd, Al Barsha

name: Lal Qila Dubai
description: Pakistani cuisine.

name: London Fish & Chips
description: Fish, chips, sharky meals, traditional battered, baked potatoes, sandwiches, salads and soups
address: Tunisia Food Court, Ibn Batutta Mall, Jebel Ali Village

name: Toscana
description: Italian.

name: Al Fresco
description: Specialized in Italian food with cosy outdoor seating. Business lunch, Family friendly place. Smoking and alcohol is permitted. Try the garlic bruschetta with traditional tomato, the leafy green salad, oozy burrata cheese, tomato, sprinkled with drizzles of balsamic vinegar.
address: Crowne Plaza, Dubai, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Al Mahara
description: Part of the Burj Al Arab hotel, and as you would expect is also very high quality, especially seafood.

name: At.mosphere
description: Exclusive fine dining restaurant on Level 122 of Burj Khalifa.

name: The Gem Garden
description: Continental restaurant.
address: Holiday Inn Dubai - Al Barsha, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Margaux
description: European, steak and continental cuisine. Pleasing and stunning ambiance with variations and one could enjoy the views of Burj Khalifa and the fountain shows.
address: Souk al Bahar, opp dubai mall fountains

name: Options, by Sanjeev Kapoor
description: Run by famed Indian TV chef Sanjeev Kapoor. Drinks served. Reservations recommended especially on Friday nights.

name: The Royal Budha
description: Authentic Thai restaurant.
address: Holiday Inn Dubai - Al Barsha, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Shang Palace
description: Good Chinese food. No smoking
address: Level 1, Shangri-La Hotel, Shk Zayed Rd

name: Al Nafoorah
description: Arabic, Lebanese and Middle Eastern cuisines. Outdoor seating with perfect sense of fine dining accompanied with comfortable, Arabian-style terrace. Smoking and alcohol is permitted.
address: Jumeirah, Emirates Towers Boulevard, Sheikh Zayed Road

description: Jumeirah Beach Hotel Complex. Open air bar with great views of the Burj hotel and the Jumeirah beach hotel all helped by a cool breeze from the ocean. Various DJs but think Ibiza lounge bar and you will not be far off.

name: Buddha Bar
description: Branch of the international Asian-themed bar/restaurant. Full of crowds.
address: Grosvenor House Dubai, Al Sufouh Rd

name: Barasti
description: Built in three levels (each playing its own music), with lounging areas on the beach, lots of young and foreign people come here during the weekend. Very popular with expats.

name: Nasimi Beach
description: Great bar/club on the beach in the Palm Jumeirah.

name: Long's Bar
description: The longest bar in the UAE, typical English style with live football, similar to a UK Wetherspoons. Great music and DJs plus food and friendly atmosphere.

name: Left Bank
description: O the waterfront in one of the most tranquil areas of Dubai. A great food menu leads on to some excellent cocktails and music inside.

name: Observatory
description: Bar and restaurant with great view across Palm Jumeirah (on a clear day!) Popular happy hour with the after work crowd on Thursday from 18:00-20:00.

name: Skyview Bar
description: Live local and international bands, reservations are a must.

name: Vu's Bar
description: Try the 51st Floor house cocktail, it's so deliciously strong, also there's a staggering 200 cocktails to choose from.

name: Zero Gravity
description: Beach club, a nice place for partying.

name: VIP Room
description: It is a lounge-like lively space that offers mid-range to high-price drinks. The huge multi-color circular space is cornered by large LCD screens and exclusive tables and the scantily clad podium dancers.
address: JW Marriott, Marquis Hotel Dubai, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: The Act
description: This venue is full of dance artists, mischievous performances, women performing unusual stunts and on-stage antics. It is a place where you will forget that you are in Dubai. The drinks are good and are slightly over priced but this place will make you feels liberated, little bit different and edgy.

name: The Cigar Bar
description: Specialized in true cigar aficionado, cognacs and whiskies. Smoking is permitted. Dresscode is smart casuals. It is a traditional venue with modern rich dark enveloping and mahogany lined interior furnishing. The Cigar Bar will be closed during the Holy Month of Ramadan

name: Zinc
description: It is the city’s most popular nightclubs with girls night out, dance floor and variety of DJ sets. This place is always over crowded and the drinks are budget friendly.
address: Crowne Plaza Dubai, Sheikh Zayed Road

name: Jebel Ali Club
description: A good restaurant with relaxing pub, pools, darts, swimming pool and steam rooms. The drink and food is budget friendly.
address: Old Jabel Ali Village, Near Ibn Battuta Mall (Sheikh Zayed Rd), Dubai

name: The Kebab Shop
description: Good budget friendly food specialized in British, Pakistani, Indian and Turkish food

name: Kcal Healthy Fast Food
description: Healthy fast food and great dining experience.

name: Chicken Tikka Inn
description: Awesome place for great Indian food.

name: La Fontana
description: Mediterranean cuisine, generous breakfast buffet, international dishes and a variety of themed dinner buffets, either indoors or on the large outdoor terrace.
address: JA Palm Tree Court, Ground Floor, next to the La Fontana Swimming Pool

name: Mushref Bar
description: Shaded by palm trees with numerous pool bars, entertainment zones and sunbeds.
address: JA Jebel Ali, Beach Hotel, Jebel Ali

name: Palmito Pool Bar
description: Swim-up pool bar serving good drinks and refreshments.
address: JA Palm Tree Court, Jebel Ali, Dubai

name: Sunset Lounge
description: Great Beverages.
address: JA Jebel Ali Beach Hotel, Jebel Ali

name: Diablo Nightclub Dubai
description: It is a Moroccan Themed lounge that serves cocktails, shisha, teas and coffees.
address: Ibn Battuta Gate Hotel in Jebel Ali

name: The Bar
description: Casual lounge with indoor and al fresco seating. It serves beverages, cocktails, light snacks and light dishes.
address: Courtyard by Marriott Dubai Green Community

name: Al Mallah
description: Amazing food. It is popular for casual dining, juices, sandwiches and fast food. A good place to visit along with family and friends.

name: Sidra
description: Specialized in Arabic, Lebanese and Middle Eastern Foods. This spacious alfresco area is bigger than other restaurants, full of shrubs and bushes with two distinct large indoor spaces - smokers and non-smokers. It is open for post party up to 4am.
